title: AI Search Experience — SXO in the Age of Generative Search
h1: SXO in the Age of AI Search
meta_description: Generative search changes how visibility is earned and how experience is governed. SXO provides the structural layer for navigating AI-driven search environments.
canonical_intent: Position SuperSXO as structurally relevant to AI-driven search without making unsupported performance claims. Establish early authority in the AI search readiness category.
summary: This page examines the implications of AI-generated search for the search-to-action journey. It frames SXO as the appropriate governance model for digital assets navigating generative search. All claims about AI search dynamics are classified as interpretation.

required_sections.name: ai_search_context
required_sections.purpose: Explain the structural shift toward generative and AI-assisted search results. Must be classified as interpretation, not proven fact.

required_sections.name: what_changes_for_visibility
required_sections.purpose: Explain how AI search affects the Visibility layer of the SXO journey. Interpretive claims must be explicitly labeled as such.

required_sections.name: what_remains_constant
required_sections.purpose: Establish that the fundamental search-to-action journey layers remain relevant regardless of search interface format.

required_sections.name: sxo_as_ai_readiness_framework
required_sections.purpose: Position the SuperSXO Framework as the appropriate structural response to AI search. Not a guarantee. A governance model.

required_sections.name: trust_and_experience_in_ai_search
required_sections.purpose: Explore how trust architecture and experience quality become more critical when AI systems mediate discovery.

blocked_claims: SuperSXO guarantees visibility in AI search results.
Following the SXO Framework guarantees AI search inclusion.
AI search rewards SXO-optimized sites exclusively.
Specific AI ranking factor claims without cited sources.
editorial_notes: All claims about AI search must be classified as 'interpretation' in the final content. No performance promises. No guarantees. This page must feel analytically credible, not trend-chasing. Avoid 'optimize' in the context of AI search ranking — it implies guaranteed outcomes. Use 'govern' or 'structure' instead.
publication_blockers: All AI-related claims must be reviewed and classified as interpretation.
No unsupported AI performance claims may appear in published copy.
Route status must be 'published' in data/routes.json.
All internal links must resolve to published routes.
